app.name: Jentic Public APIs
app.one_liner: A communal, AI-native catalog of global API and workflow knowledge built on OpenAPI and Arazzo standards.

screens.name: API Catalog Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display the curated list of APIs and associated workflows available for AI agent consumption.

rust_commands.name: generate_arazzo_workflow
rust_commands.purpose: Use generative AI to create a multi-API Arazzo workflow based on existing specifications.

rust_commands.name: import_openapi_spec
rust_commands.purpose: Automatically ingest and validate an external OpenAPI specification into the repository.

mvp_plan: week 1: Generate initial batch of Arazzo workflows using AI
week 1: Implement automated OpenAPI ingestion pipeline
week 1: Set up repository structure per STRUCTURE.md
acceptance_tests: AI-generated yepcode.io specification passes basic structural validation.
An Arazzo workflow combining zestfuldata.com and zenrows.com is generated and stored.
An OpenAPI spec from zipcodeapi.com is successfully imported and validated.
Community contributor submits a PR adding yeti-switch.org API via Discord-guided process.
